name: claude-tool-audit
description: Single-plugin marketplace ▸ the claude-tool-audit auditor itself.

plugins.name: claude-tool-audit
plugins.description: Interactive auditor for tools added to Claude Code projects. Scores candidates against four gates — Observability, Cost, Simplicity, Correctness — on a letter scale (A+..F). Helps set per-gate project budgets and pick a vendoring strategy.
